metadata.title: Assessment Plan - MFA Enforcement for Guest Users

activities.title: Query Conditional Access Policies
activities.description: Authenticate to Microsoft Graph API using client credentials and retrieve all Conditional Access policies from the target tenant.

steps.title: Authenticate to Microsoft Graph
steps.description: Obtain an OAuth2 access token using client credentials flow against the Microsoft identity platform token endpoint.

steps.title: Fetch Conditional Access Policies
steps.description: Call GET /identity/conditionalAccess/policies on Microsoft Graph v1.0 API to retrieve all Conditional Access policy definitions.

activities.title: Evaluate MFA Enforcement for Guests
activities.description: Analyze the retrieved Conditional Access policies to determine whether at least one enabled policy requires MFA for guest or external users.

steps.title: Check Policy Existence
steps.description: Verify that at least one Conditional Access policy exists in the tenant.

steps.title: Check Guest User Targeting
steps.description: Verify that the policy targets guest or external users via conditions.users.includeGuestsOrExternalUsers or equivalent configuration.

steps.title: Check Policy State
steps.description: Verify that the policy state is 'enabled', not 'disabled' or 'enabledForReportingButNotEnforced'.

steps.title: Check MFA Grant Control
steps.description: Verify that the policy's grantControls.builtInControls array contains 'mfa'.
